title: Department Manager Vacancy at Crossword Bookstores - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Crossword Bookstores - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Crossword Bookstores is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Tiruchirappalli. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Crossword Bookstores:
Crossword Bookstores is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crossword Bookstores!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
